title: Survival Gray
description: A zombie apocalypse survival modpack I made to play with my friends.
body:
![Modpack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WQU1Dt3m/images/9a9668f0bc734e2e333353a8d5dd95b6a0a68be6.png)
# 🧟 Survive in a world where the undead are merciless.

This modpack focuses on survival mechanics and resource management. You’ll need to explore the world for supplies and materials, and build a secure shelter to make it through the night, or be a madman and try to survive outside.

## ✅ Notable Features

- **Only Zombies:** Zombies are the only main treat.
- **Advanced Zombies:** Various types with improved awareness and behavior.
- **Temperature System:** Stay warm or cool depending on the environment - exposure can be deadly.
- **Hydration:** Water is essential; dehydration can kill (drink water).
- **Weapons:** Defend yourself with a variety of weapons, including guns.
- **Only Overworld:** _The Nether_ and the End are disabled.

**I recommend to at least allocate 4GB of RAM to play multiplayer**  
**I recommend to at least allocate 8GB of RAM to play singleplayer**

## 🎨 Resource Packs Included

- [Zombies Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/zombies-revamped) by [spunkyinsaan](https://modrinth.com/user/spunkyinsaan)
- [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys) by [thebaum64](https://modrinth.com/user/thebaum64)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)
- [Human Era: Villagers & Illagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/human-era-villagers-illagers) - [Credits](https://www.mediafire.com/folder/czsxvrynmgup5/Credits)

## ☀️ Shaders Included

- [Insanity Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/insanity-shader) by [ElocinDev](https://modrinth.com/user/ElocinDev), [LunaPixelStudios](https://modrinth.com/user/LunaPixelStudios)

## ⏳ Lag?

Try disabling/removing these mods:

- Iris
- Wakes
- Particular
- Particle Rain
- FancyMenu
- Drippy Loading Screen
- Explosive Enhancement
- Drip Sounds
- AmbientSounds
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Cool Rain
- Sounds

## 📝 Notes
1. _**If you are going to use shaders, disable the Dramatic Skys resource pack.**_
2. _**this is my first time making a modpack meant to be public and my fourth modpack in general, meaning that I still a novice at making modpacks, so expect some things to feel rough around the edges.**_
